questionHtml:
The cladogram shows the relationships of five species I to V.

Which species is/are most closely related to IV?

A.  V only

B.  II and III

C.  III and V

D.  II, III and V

meta.title: The cladogram shows the relationships of five species I to V. Which species is/are most closely related to IV? A. V only B. II and III C. III and V D. II, III and V
